subcodes.first_line: O thou my sister, my dear sister! Divine wisdom hath decreed this temporary separation, but I long more and more
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا شقیقتی بل شفیقتی العزیزه حکمت الهیه حکم بفراق موقت نمود ولی اشتیاق در
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for service, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @travels to Egypt by Abdu'l-Baha
